subject: “i’ll figure it out later”
body:
Justin, going to be direct with you here.

My upcoming Masterclass is not for everyone.

If you are just curious about AI, or happy staying in I will figure it out later mode...

You can skip this.

But if you know AI is the opportunity you need to move on and you are stuck on how to actually make the transition...

This is exactly for you.

Most people I speak to are not lacking effort or ambition.

They are balancing jobs, families, maybe other businesses on the side. And they do not want to choose the wrong path and waste six months going nowhere.

I get it.

This Masterclass is to give you clarity on choosing the right path. I am talking actual paths, actual decisions, actual next steps.

Final call if you are serious about making a change in 2026.

Liam.
